case_title: GWENDOLYN SMITH VS. TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR, LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, GWENDOLYN AS TO DEFENDANT TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR, LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, GWENDOLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR, LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $861.52 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,086.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
